framing: Freelance UX Designer seeking full-time product design role

jd.title: Senior Product Designer

requirements.text: 5+ years of product design experience for web and mobile applications
Strong portfolio demonstrating end-to-end design process from research to final UI
Experience conducting user research, usability testing, and synthesizing findings
Experience building and maintaining design systems
Ability to create interactive prototypes for user testing and stakeholder alignment
Experience working in cross-functional agile teams with engineers and PMs
Experience with data-informed design decisions (analytics, A/B testing)
Bachelor's degree in Design, HCI, or related field
Experience designing developer tools or B2B SaaS products

responsibilities: Design new features and improve existing experiences for Figma's core product
Conduct user research to validate design decisions and identify unmet needs
Build and maintain Figma's internal design system components
Create high-fidelity mockups and interactive prototypes
Collaborate with engineering to ensure pixel-perfect implementation
Present design work to stakeholders and incorporate feedback iteratively

expected_output.summary: Product Designer with 7 years of experience across freelance and in-house roles, specializing in B2B SaaS and developer tools. Designed end-to-end experiences for 12+ clients including Notion, Linear, and 3 YC-backed startups. Expert Figma user who has built 2 published design systems. Strong in user research, prototyping, and design-to-engineering handoff. Seeking full-time role to go deeper on a single product.

experience.title: Freelance Product Designer
bullets: Designed product experiences for 12+ B2B SaaS clients including Notion (contract), Linear (contract), and 3 YC-backed startups
Built and published 2 Figma design systems adopted by client engineering teams (50+ components each)
Conducted 40+ user research interviews and usability tests across engagements, synthesizing findings into actionable recommendations
Created interactive Figma prototypes used for investor demos and user testing, contributing to $8M combined client funding
Managed end-to-end design process: discovery, wireframing, visual design, prototyping, and developer handoff

experience.title: Product Designer
bullets: Designed scheduling flow improvements resulting in 12% increase in completed bookings (A/B tested)
Contributed to Calendly's design system, creating 15 reusable components with usage documentation
Collaborated with 3 cross-functional squads (engineering, PM, data) in 2-week sprint cycles
Conducted bi-weekly usability testing sessions with 5 participants per round

experience.title: Junior UX Designer
bullets: Designed responsive web experiences for enterprise clients in fintech and healthcare verticals
Created wireframes, user flows, and high-fidelity mockups in Sketch and Figma
Supported senior designers on user research planning and synthesis

certifications: Interaction Design Foundation — UX Management certification
education: BFA Graphic Design — Rhode Island School of Design (2013-2017)

deliberate_flaws: Freelance history — no single long-tenure role (hiring concern for full-time)
Notion and Linear were contracts, not full-time (could be misinterpreted)
No formal analytics/data skills beyond A/B test interpretation

provenance.notes: Synthetic persona and JD. JD style modeled from real Greenhouse/Lever postings. Expected output and cloud_skills are AI-generated. 4/8 scorecard checks (jd_coverage, no_fabrication, metrics_preserved, no_fabricated_skills) evaluate AI vs AI reference. 4/8 checks (factual_preservation, word_count, ats_structure, action_verbs) are structurally valid regardless.
